semantic_description: In-place string character replacement over a caller-owned char array. The function scans s from index 0 with a while (1) loop until it reaches the terminating 0 byte; for each nonzero character before the terminator, it writes new_c when the original character equals old_c and otherwise preserves the original character. The contract requires a nonzero payload of length n followed by a zero terminator, requires new_c != 0, preserves the zero terminator, and returns ownership of the same buffer containing the transformed payload.
